title: Day & Night
description: A Fabric mod that adds two new metals into the game. Every metal gives different effect to the owner. Inspired by the day and by the night.
body:
# **DAY & NIGHT - The Dual Metal Mod**

## Overview
The **DAY & NIGHT** mod transforms your Minecraft experience with two unique metals, **Midnightium** and **Lucentium**, designed specifically for players with different playstyles. **Midnightium** is crafted for fierce fighters, while **Lucentium** supports brave explorers. Each metal provides special properties, new crafting recipes, and powerful items that will give you the edge you need, whether you battle the night or explore the day.

## Features
### ***Midnightium Items***  
Forged through the mysterious **Nightlight**, Midnightium is ideal for combat-focused players. Items crafted from **Midnightium** feature high attack damage but slightly lower durability. To create **Midnightium Scrap**, toss a specified item onto the **Nightlight**. Collect 8 scraps and combine them with an **Amethyst Shard** to produce a **Midnightium Ingot**. This ingot is the key to forging armor and tools with formidable power.

***Midnightium Items*** include:  
- **Midnightium Scrap**: The primary crafting material for Midnightium items.  
- **Midnightium Ingot**: Used to craft armor and tools.  
- **Tools**: Midnightium Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, which have high attack but low durability.
- **Armor**: Midnightium Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots. When the full set is worn, special bonuses are activated for fighters.
- **Blocks**: Midnightium Block, a decorative block.  

### ***Lucentium Items***  
Created using the **Daylight**, **Lucentium** is the ultimate choice for exploration enthusiasts. Items forged from **Lucentium** have high durability but lower attack damage, making them perfect for extended adventures. To obtain **Lucentium Scrap**, throw a specified item onto the **Daylight**. Gather 8 scraps and combine them with an *Amethyst Shard* to form a **Lucentium Ingot**, which is essential for crafting robust tools and armor.

***Lucentium Items*** include: 
- **Lucentium Scrap**: The essential component for crafting Lucentium items.  
- **Lucentium Ingot**: Used to create Lucentium tools and armor.  
- **Tools**: Lucentium Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, optimized for exploration with long-lasting durability.
- **Armor**: Lucentium Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots. The full armor set provides special buffs, perfect for explorers who love venturing into new biomes.
- **Blocks**: Lucentium Block, a radiant decorative block.  

### ***Day & Night Items***  
Beyond the metals themselves, **Daylight** and **Nightlight** serve as essential components in this mod. Along with these, you can discover rare items like the **Dark Diamond** and **Bright Diamond**, each essential in unlocking the full potential of **Midnightium** and **Lucentium**.

***Day & Night Items*** include:
- **Nightlight**: Used to create Midnightium Scrap, harnessing the power of darkness.
- **Daylight**: Used to forge Lucentium Scrap, capturing the essence of daylight.
- **Dark Diamond**: An item used to craft the Nightlight.
- **Bright Diamond**: An item used to craft the Daylight.

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft Versions**: 1.21, 1.21.1
- **Mod Loader**: Fabric

### Co-Creators
@muffoi

### Usefull mods
